name: John Doe
subject: Question about licensing
message: Hello, I am interested in using ShadcnAuth for a commercial project. I have some questions regarding the license terms.

name: Jane Smith
subject: Bug report: Login issue
message: I found a minor bug in the login form where the error message doesn't disappear immediately after correcting the email.

name: Robert Wilson
subject: Feature request: Dark mode customization
message: It would be great if we could customize the accent colors for dark mode directly from the admin panel.
